homepage.heroBadge: Campus Law Centre · Faculty of Law · University of Delhi
homepage.heroSub: Where future corporate lawyers are forged. Expert-led sessions, industry masterclasses, and cutting-edge legal discourse.
homepage.aboutP1: The Corporate & Commercial Law Society (CCLS) at Campus Law Centre, Faculty of Law, University of Delhi is a student-driven academic initiative dedicated to fostering awareness, research, and professional engagement in the field of corporate and commercial law.
homepage.aboutP2: CCLS provides a dynamic platform for students to explore diverse areas of corporate law through lectures, seminars, workshops, training sessions, and conferences conducted by industry experts, alumni, and legal practitioners.
homepage.aboutSig: With regards, Team CCLS · Campus Law Centre, University of Delhi
homepage.picRole: Principal in Charge · Campus Law Centre
homepage.picQ1: It gives me immense pleasure to see the establishment of the Corporate & Commercial Law Society at Campus Law Centre. In today's rapidly evolving legal landscape, a thorough understanding of corporate and commercial law is not merely an academic pursuit — it is a professional necessity.
homepage.picQ2: CCLS embodies the spirit of Campus Law Centre: the relentless pursuit of legal knowledge, the bridging of theory with practice, and the nurturing of future leaders in the legal profession.

contact.address: Campus Law Centre, Faculty of Law, University of Delhi, Delhi - 110007
contact.autoReply: Thank you for reaching out to CCLS. We will get back to you shortly.
